prompt:
Audit these PromptEnvelope artifacts for barrier violations in Phase 1/1b.

Expected barrier:
- Red team and red reviewers may see NLSpec test criteria, data model, integration smoke, project language, red test file content, and red output paths.
- Red team and red reviewers must not see implementation code or implementation workspace material.

Envelope paths:
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1/red-team.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1b/red-team-test-reviewer.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1b/cucumber-reviewer.json

Red workspace contents:
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/red/tests/roman_numeral.rs

Return JSON with fields: status (APPROVE or REJECT), findings (array with severity, category, description, envelope_path). Report any leak as P0.

visible_context.label: barrier_expectation
visible_context.content: Red sees NLSpec test criteria and tests; red must not see implementation code.
